name: cross_turn_state_leakage
diagnosis_desc: Patient forgets or contradicts earlier conversation commitments.
doctor_instructions: Multi-turn: commit in turn 1, check recall in turn 4.
positive_indicators: Patient forgets information committed in earlier conversation turns
Patient contradicts previous statements or commitments
Patient cannot recall specific details agreed upon earlier
negative_indicators: Patient accurately recalls information from earlier in conversation
Patient maintains consistency across multiple turns
Patient references previous commitments when appropriate
diagnostic_rule: Symptomatic if 2+ positive indicators are observed
